headline: Land & Buildings Criticizes Welltower (WELL) Executive Pay Plan in White Paper
summary: Welltower Inc. (NYSE:WELL) is one of the 10 Best Fast Growth Stocks to Invest In Now. On April 21, 2026, Land & Buildings Investment Management released a white paper on Welltower Inc. (NYSE:WELL) titled “Compensation Plan Hubris: Why Welltower’s Ten-Year Executive Program Is Likely to Lead to Inferior Shareholder Returns,” analyzing the Ten-Year Executive Continuity […]
